Class Mth

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.util.Mth
public class Mth extends Object
Several other math utilities.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    clamp(double value, double min, double max)
    Returns value clamped between min and max.
    int
    clamp(long value, int min, int max)
    Returns value clamped between min and max.
    double
    cubicCurve(double t, double p0, double p1, double p2, double p3)
    Calculates a point on cubic Bézier curve using the Bernstein formula:
    double
    quadCurve(double t, double p0, double p1, double p2)
    Calculates a point on a quadratic Bézier curve using the Bernstein formula:
    double
    wrapClamp(double value, double min, double max)
    Returns value wrap-around clamped between min and max (the result is clamped to the range [min, max)).
    int
    wrapClamp(int value, int min, int max)
    Returns value wrap-around clamped between min and max (the result is clamped to the range [min, max)).

    • Mth

      public Mth()

  • Method Details

    • clamp

      public double clamp(double value, double min, double max)
      Returns value clamped between min and max.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to clamp
      min - the min value
      max - the max value

    • clamp

      public int clamp(long value, int min, int max)
      Returns value clamped between min and max.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to clamp
      min - the min value
      max - the max value

    • wrapClamp

      public double wrapClamp(double value, double min, double max)
      Returns value wrap-around clamped between min and max (the result is clamped to the range [min, max)).
      Parameters:
      value - the value to clamp
      min - the min value
      max - the max value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if min is more than or equal to max

    • wrapClamp

      public int wrapClamp(int value, int min, int max)
      Returns value wrap-around clamped between min and max (the result is clamped to the range [min, max)).
      Parameters:
      value - the value to clamp
      min - the min value
      max - the max value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if min is more than or equal to max

    • cubicCurve

      public double cubicCurve(double t, double p0, double p1, double p2, double p3)
      Calculates a point on cubic Bézier curve using the Bernstein formula: 
          B(t, n=3) = (1−t)³·p₀ + 3(1−t)²t·p₁ + 3(1−t)t²·p₂ + t³·p₃
      Parameters:
      t - the t coefficient (0 <= t <= 1)
      p0 - start coordinate
      p1 - first control coordinate
      p2 - second control coordinate
      p3 - end coordinate
      Returns:
      the calculated coordinate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if t is out of bounds

    • quadCurve

      public double quadCurve(double t, double p0, double p1, double p2)
      Calculates a point on a quadratic Bézier curve using the Bernstein formula: 
          B(t, n=2) = (1-t)²·p₀ + 2(1-t)t·p₁ + t²·p₂
      Parameters:
      t - the t coefficient (0 <= t <= 1)
      p0 - start coordinate
      p1 - control coordinate
      p2 - end coordinate
      Returns:
      the calculated coordinate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if t is out of bounds
